negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. Overall, the video is of poor quality.
name: human_010
prompt: The video opens with a bustling urban street scene, likely in a European city, characterized by a mix of modern and historic architecture. The foreground showcases a paved pedestrian area where numerous individuals are walking. A person in ripped jeans and black boots is prominently featured, holding a brown paper bag, and appears to be walking steadily towards the camera. Other pedestrians, dressed in coats and scarves, are also moving through the scene, some carrying shopping bags, suggesting a commercial area. A blue bus with visible advertisements is partially visible on the left side of the frame, parked on the side of the road. The background includes a mix of buildings, one with a clock tower, and a large Christmas tree, indicating a festive season. The sky is clear, adding to the pleasant atmosphere. As the video progresses, the individual in ripped jeans continues to walk forward, slightly shifting their stance. Other pedestrians, including a woman pushing a stroller and another man with a shopping bag, continue their journey, some glancing around or interacting with companions. The overall environment reflects the everyday hustle and bustle of city life during what seems to be a holiday season.  A low-angle shot captures the movement of the pedestrians, emphasizing the dynamic nature of the scene. The camera follows the person in ripped jeans, providing a sense of depth and perspective. The background, with its mix of architectural styles and festive decorations, adds context to the setting. The clear sky and the presence of the Christmas tree enhance the lively and cheerful mood of the video.
